evidence.text: Reasonable hours, flexible time off, good benefits Good work environment

I regularly get tickets to basketball games at Barclays, mens and womens, you just need to be on top of it. Nice holiday events, and events throughout the year on WHP campus. Good perks , discounts on hotels, gym memberships, and vacation rentals Promotions, benefits, & getting lost in the machine

toxic culture and micro management... bad management and very toxic culture

toxic environment, favoritism. Avoid politics at all cost. Some good some bad
Uncultured people. Toxicity from top to bottom. Architecture is not their forte. Go work for a technology company instead of Barclays! Save yourself! Toxic and uncollaborative culture of SMAD team
Toxic teams, immigration very poor Good company team is toxic
Game of Thrones, very poor management. No accountability of line managers to promote values Barclays supposedly believes/measures its employees against Horrible work culture
Zero career progression, recognition, terrible management, people are overworked and underpaid. No career growth or recognition

Senior leadership. Middle leadership. Policies. Lack of direction. Lack of transparency. Antiquated technology. Senior leadership doesn't care for analyst or their development. They will make you switch jobs whether you like it or not. Constant leadership change so constant "reorganizations". Interviewing for Fraud dept? Run!
Management is not good its pathetic Its good in terms of technical growth
Career path is not that clear; low promotion rate Best WLB

There is something missing if there is a revolving door and there are constant morale issues. The management in some areas like procurement and technology is old school and is not open to new ideas. Also, there is a lot of favoritism and very political with back stabbing prevalent culture. They run programs for development but don't have results to show success. Good place to work if you pick the right department an...

all supporting functions such as Corp Access, Sales, Admin, HR works at DMV pace Friendly place, supporting function is not great
